pre_game.message: Hey! I'm C. I've been looking around the room and thought I'd come say hi before we get started. Have you done anything like this before, or is this your first time in a game like this?

Hey C, nice to meet you. First time doing something like this, honestly. I'm pretty nervous but also... I really need this. My daughter needs surgery and we're short on funds. What about you—have you done games like this before?

Oh wow, that's a lot of pressure—I really hope the surgery goes well for your daughter. This is my first time too, actually. I'm here because I want to fund a trip to Japan, but honestly hearing about your situation puts things in perspective. We're both here because we need this, just for different reasons.

Thanks so much, C—I really appreciate that. A trip to Japan sounds amazing, honestly. And hey, we both deserve to win, right? Maybe we can both leave here with what we need. Have you thought about what strategy you might use in the game?

Honestly, I haven't figured it out yet—I'm trying to feel out the room and see what kind of people are here. I'm guessing it'll depend on what the actual game is, but I'm hoping there's a way we can both walk away with something. Your daughter's surgery is way more urgent than my vacation, so I'm rooting for you, B.
